description: Measures core development areas: Knowledge, Personality, and Character

questions.text: I stay updated with the latest trends and information in my field.
I actively seek out new learning opportunities and courses.
I am confident in my theoretical understanding of my specialization.
I enjoy sharing my knowledge with others to help them grow.
I am self-aware of my strengths and weaknesses.
I can easily adapt my behavior to suit different social or professional situations.
I stay calm and composed even when facing unexpected challenges.
I am proactive in taking the initiative in group settings.
I always stick to my ethical principles, even when it's difficult.
I take full responsibility for my actions and their consequences.
Honesty and integrity are the most important values in my professional life.
I am committed to completing my tasks even when I encounter obstacles.
